query: Use datocms-setup-cda-client to install @datocms/cda-client, add the published CDA token placeholder, and scaffold the shared query utility for this Astro project.
Please run datocms-setup-cda-client in this repo. I want the minimal read-only DatoCMS content client before setting up draft mode or cache tags.
Invoke datocms-setup-cda-client and patch the framework query wrapper so it uses the published DatoCMS CDA token with excludeInvalid.
Use datocms-setup-draft-mode to add preview endpoints and dual-token CDA reads.
Use datocms-setup-cache-tags so DatoCMS content changes can invalidate cached pages by tag.
Use datocms-setup-graphql-types to configure gql.tada for typed DatoCMS GraphQL queries.
How do I write a DatoCMS CDA GraphQL query with filters and pagination?
